report: Shift handoff report: Pressure transmitter PT-204 indicated 42 psi while the mechanical gauge at the same location read 71 psi. A second redundant transmitter agreed with the mechanical gauge. No other alarms were active. Because the available indications conflict, the affected component and failure mode cannot be determined reliably without additional inspection.
evidence: Pressure transmitter PT-204 indicated 42 psi while the mechanical gauge read 71 psi.
A second redundant transmitter agreed with the mechanical gauge.
No other alarms were active.
recommended_action: Verify transmitter calibration, compare with redundant instrumentation, and inspect the pressure sensing line before diagnosing the fault.
